\tzpentry{ID4509}{Final Acbd Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4509 introduces Final Acbd Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T^{\mu}{}{\nu} = {\rm diag}(\rho(r,\theta), -p_r(r,\theta), -p\theta(r,\theta), -p_\phi(r,\theta))~, \end{equation}
